[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101100 4
1 0001111 4
2 1100101 4
3 0011010 3
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0111001 4
7 1101000 3

01 10 1111001 5
12 21 1111100 5
23 32 1110101 5
34 43 1111101 6
45 54 1101111 6
56 65 1101111 6
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 0111011 5

13 31 1111001 5

46 64 1101101 5
57 75 0011111 5
60 06 1111101 6
71 17 1111010 5

14 41 1101100 4 match 0

47 74 1111110 6
50 05 0111111 6
61 16 1101101 5
72 27 0111110 5
